entries.title: Commentary on Lamentations on lamentations 3:23
entries.excerpt: Second, an approbation from the Lord's divine mercy is indicated. "They are new every morning; great is thy faithfulness." Namely, as I, the Lord God, openly approve. Again: "great is thy faithfulness." That is, regarding Jeremiah, who, among your suppliants, acknowledge you. For, the Apostle Matthew reports: "Then Jesus answered her, 'O woman, great is your faith! Be it done for you as you desire'." (Matthew 15:28).
